zh.Laval, Laval, Mayenne, Pays-de-la Loire,: 法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾拉瓦爾-斯特
zh.lifeSummary: Guy de Laval是Geoffrey DeLaval I的兒子，於大約1000年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾拉瓦爾-斯特。他於大約1023年與Berthe de Tosny在法國哈帕格-亞登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1065年享年67歲。

zh-hans.Laval, Laval, Mayenne, Pays-de-la Loire,: 法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾拉瓦爾-斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Guy de Laval是Geoffrey DeLaval I的儿子，于大约1000年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾拉瓦爾-斯特。他于大约1023年与Berthe de Tosny在法国哈帕格-亞登结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1065年享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Laval
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, Old French val (originally feminine, later masculine; see Val , compare Lavallee ), or a habitational name from Laval, the name of several places in various parts of France, ultimately derived from Latin vallis ‘valley’.

variants.name: Val
meanings: Spanish: variant of Valle , from val, a variant of valle ‘valley’. Compare Delval .
Galician and Portuguese: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, val (compare 3 below). Compare also Doval .

French and Haitian: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, (Old) French val (originally feminine, later masculine; compare Vallee ), from Latin vallis (feminine). Compare Duval and Laval .

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: Guy de Laval was born about 1000, in Laval-Est, Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France as the son of Geoffrey DeLaval I. He married Berthe de Tosny about 1023, in Champagne-Ardenne, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died about 1065, at the age of 67.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy de Lavalは約1000年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンラヴァルラヴァル-エストでGeoffrey DeLaval Iの息子として生まれた。約1023年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンでBerthe de Tosnyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は約1065年に67歳で死去した。

ko.Laval, Laval, Mayenne, Pays-de-la Loire,: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라발 라발-스트
ko.lifeSummary: Guy de Laval(은)는 대략 1000년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라발 라발-스트에서 Geoffrey DeLaval I의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1023년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니에서 Berthe de Tosny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1065년 67세의 나이로 사망했다.
